basic_details.job_title: ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Lab Tech, DEO and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Various Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Ranchi has published the Various Medical, Para-Medical & Non-Medical Staff Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 21 positions across multiple posts on a contractual basis. Candidates with post-specific qualifications such as Graduate, MBBS, MD/MS, DNB, GNM, B.Sc (Medical Lab Technology), Diploma in Pharmacy, or relevant Armed Forces certifications, and with the required experience, are eligible to apply offline. The application process will be active until 04 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and a

age_limit.details: OIC Polyclinic: Age up to 63 yrs (ESM only) Med Specialist: Age up to 68 yrs Med Offr: Age up to 66 yrs IT Net WkTech: Age up to 56 yrs Lab Tech: Age up to 56 yrs Dental Hygienist Dental Assistant: Age up to 56 yrs Nursing Assistant: Age up to 56 yrs Pharmacist: Age up to 56 yrs DEO/CIk: Age up to 53 yrs Cik: Age up to 53 yrs DEO: Age up to 53 yrs Driver: Age up to 53 yrs Female Attendant: Age up to 53 yrs

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Minimum 05 yrs wk experience in Health Care Institutions or Managerial positions, MD/MS in speciality concerned/DNB Min 03 yrs in Speciality after post Graduation, MBBS Min 03 yrs wk experience after internship, Diploma cert/Equivalent in IT Networking Computer application, B.Sc(Medical Lab Technology) or Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary(10+2) with Science and Diploma in Medical Lab Technology, Diploma Holder in Dental Hygienist/Class-1DH/DORA Course(Armed Forces), GNM Diploma/C-II Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces), B Pharmacy & Diploma in Pharmacy, Graduate/ Class-1 clerical trade(Armed forces), Education-8th Class-I M1 driver (Armed forces) with civil driving license, Literate
qualification.details: OIC Polyclinic: Graduate, Minimum 05 yrs wk experience in Health Care Institutions or Managerial positions. Med Specialist: MD/MS in speciality concerned/DNB Min 03 yrs in Speciality after post Graduation. Med Offr: MBBS Min 03 yrs wk experience after internship Preferable addl Qualification in medicine/Surgery. IT Net WkTech: Diploma cert/Equivalent in IT Networking Computer application. Minimum two yr wk experience. Lab Tech: B.Sc(Medical Lab Technology) or (i) Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary(10+2) with Science from Recognized Institution/Board (ii) Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a Recognized Institution. Minimum 03 yrs experience as a Lab Assistant in Medical Lab. Dental Hygienist Dental Assistant: Diploma Holder in Dental Hygienist/Class-1DH/DORA Course(Armed Forces).Minimum 05 yrs wk experience in Dental Laboratory. Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/C-II Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces). Minimum 05 yrs work experience. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy & Diploma in Pharmacy, Computer working knowledge. Science with Phy, Chemistry & Bio. Minimum 3 yrs wk experience. DEO/CIk: Graduate/ Class-1 clerical trade(Armed forces). Minimum 5 yrs work experience. Cik: Graduate/ Class-1 clerical trade(Armed forces). Minimum 5 yrs work experience. DEO: Graduate/ Class-1 clerical trade(Armed forces). Minimum 5 yrs work experience. Driver: Education-8th Class-I M1 driver (Armed forces Possess a civil driving license. Minimum 5 yrs work experience as Driver. Female Attendant: Literate. Minimum 5 yrs work experience in Civil/Army Health institutions.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Ranchi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ECHS Ranchi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 04th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies announced for various Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical Staff positions under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) in Ranchi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address as per the instructions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the posts in ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary varies for different posts, ranging from Rs. 21,800/-pm to Rs. 1,30,000/-pm. Specific details for each post are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from being literate to holding a Graduate degree, depending on the specific post. Detailed educational requirements are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026 is www.echs.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for the official notification and application form.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for ECHS Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification specifies age limits for each post. While specific age relaxation details are not explicitly listed in the summary, it is advisable to check the official PDF for any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 04th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.
